FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class FlexLayout

Namespace
FluentGpu.Layout
Assembly
FluentGpu.Layout.dll

Flexbox layout over the SoA scene columns. Two descents: Measure (bottom-up — content/basis base sizes, honoring explicit size + min/max + text content) then Arrange (top-down — distribute free space by flex-grow/shrink, position by justify-content, align the cross axis by align-items/align-self incl. stretch, applying margins). Direction 0 = row (main = X), 1 = column (main = Y). Wrap / grid / absolute positioning are the remaining layout work.

public sealed class FlexLayout

Methods

Run(NodeHandle) 

public void Run(NodeHandle root)

Parameters

root NodeHandle

Run(NodeHandle, Size2)

Lay out the root to FILL the window (the conventional top-level behavior) — an auto-sized root takes the full client area; an explicitly-sized root keeps its size. The slice's direct Run(NodeHandle) keeps content-sizing for golden flexbox checks.

public void Run(NodeHandle root, Size2 window)

Parameters

root NodeHandle
window Size2

RunSubtree(NodeHandle)

Re-solve ONLY the subtree rooted at node against its current Bounds (or its LayoutInput size if set — a SizeMode.Relayout animation writes the interpolated width there each tick). The parent already placed this node, so this cannot propagate upward — a scoped, per-frame-affordable relayout for live reflow.

public void RunSubtree(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
